title: Task Force Intelligence Broadcast: Special Ordnance Warning
description: A message received in the Cony's radio room at 19:55 and not yet shown to the captain: a task force broadcast from USS Randolph classifying the four Foxtrot submarines as potentially carrying 'special ordnance' — naval code for nuclear weapons. The message instructs all surface units to 'exercise extreme caution in escalation of contact prosecution.' Hayes has read it. Estocin has not.
